name: iShares MSCI All Country Asia ex Japan ETF

The index includes companies from the following industries: pharmaceuticals; health care equipment & supplies; health care providers & services; biotechnology; life sciences tools & services; and health care technology. The fund is non-diversified.

name: Consumer Discretionary Select Sector SPDR Fund
summary:
The investment seeks investment results that, before expenses, correspond to the price and yield performance of publicly traded equity securities of companies in the Consumer Discretionary Select Sector Index.
 The fund employs a replication strategy. It generally invests substantially all, but at least 95%, of its total assets in the securities comprising the index. The index includes securities of companies from the following industries: retail; hotels, restaurants and leisure; textiles, apparel and luxury goods; household durables; automobiles; auto components; distributors; leisure products; and diversified consumer services. It is non-diversified.

name: SPDR S&P Metals and Mining ETF
summary:
The investment seeks to provide investment results that, before fees and expenses, correspond generally to the total return performance of an index derived from the metals and mining segment of a U.S. total market composite index.
 In seeking to track the performance of the S&P Metals & Mining Select Industry Index (the "index"), the fund employs a sampling strategy. It generally invests substantially all, but at least 80%, of its total assets in the securities comprising the index. The index represents the metals and mining segment of the S&P Total Market Index ("S&P TMI"). The fund is non-diversified.

name: Xtrackers - MSCI Europe UCITS ETF
summary: The Xtrackers - MSCI Europe UCITS ETF is an exchange-traded fund that seeks to replicate the performance of the MSCI Europe Index. The fund provides investors with access to a broad range of large and mid-cap companies across developed markets in Europe, offering diversified exposure to the region's equity market. The ETF is domiciled in Ireland.

name: XTRACKERS MSCI TAIWAN UCITS ETF
summary: XTRACKERS MSCI TAIWAN UCITS ETF aims to replicate the performance of the MSCI Taiwan Index, offering investors exposure to the Taiwanese equity market. The ETF employs a replication strategy to match the index's composition and performance. Xtrackers is a brand of exchange-traded funds (ETFs) managed by DWS Group, headquartered in Frankfurt, Germany.

name: SPDR S&P Oil & Gas Exploration & Production ETF
summary:
The investment seeks to provide investment results that, before fees and expenses, correspond generally to the total return performance of an index derived from the oil and gas exploration and production segment of a U.S. total market composite index.
 In seeking to track the performance of the S&P Oil & Gas Exploration & Production Select Industry Index, the fund employs a sampling strategy. It generally invests substantially all, but at least 80%, of its total assets in the securities comprising the index. The index represents the oil and gas exploration and production segment of the S&P Total Market Index ("S&P TMI").

name: SPDR S&P Retail ETF
summary:
The investment seeks to provide investment results that, before fees and expenses, correspond generally to the total return performance of an index derived from the retail segment of a U.S. total market composite index.
 In seeking to track the performance of the S&P Retail Select Industry Index (the "index"), the fund employs a sampling strategy. It generally invests substantially all, but at least 80%, of its total assets in the securities comprising the index. The index represents the retail segment of the S&P Total Market Index ("S&P TMI").

name: iShares Core Canadian Short Term Bond Index ETF
summary: The iShares Core Canadian Short Term Bond Index ETF seeks to replicate the performance of an index composed of Canadian investment-grade short-term bonds. This ETF, managed by BlackRock, provides investors with exposure to a diversified portfolio of Canadian short-term fixed income securities. It is headquartered in San Francisco, California.

name: SPDR S&P Semiconductor ETF
summary:
The investment seeks to provide investment results that, before fees and expenses, correspond generally to the total return performance of an index derived from the semiconductor segment of a U.S. total market composite index.
 In seeking to track the performance of the S&P Semiconductor Select Industry Index (the "index"), the fund employs a sampling strategy. It generally invests substantially all, but at least 80%, of its total assets in the securities comprising the index. The index represents the semiconductors segment of the S&P Total Market Index ("S&P TMI").

name: WisdomTree Trust - WisdomTree Emerging Markets ex-State-Owned Enterprises Fund
summary: The WisdomTree Emerging Markets ex-State-Owned Enterprises Fund (XSOE) is an exchange-traded fund that invests in dividend-paying companies in emerging markets, excluding state-owned enterprises. WisdomTree Asset Management manages this fund, offering investors exposure to the growth potential of emerging markets while avoiding companies with significant government control. WisdomTree is based in New York City.

name: iShares Trust - iShares Exponential Technologies ETF
summary: The iShares Exponential Technologies ETF seeks to track the investment results of an index composed of developed and emerging market companies that could benefit from the development and advancement of exponential technologies. BlackRock Fund Advisors manages the fund. It is headquartered in San Francisco, California.

name: XTRACKERS MSCI EURO SMALL CAP U
Global X Funds - Global X S&P 500 Covered Call ETF
summary: Global X S&P 500 Covered Call ETF seeks to provide investment results that correspond generally to the price and yield performance, before fees and expenses, of the S&P 500 Covered Call Index. The fund invests in the stocks of the S&P 500 Index and writes (sells) covered call options on the same index. The ETF is managed by Global X Funds.

name: Xtrackers (IE) Plc - Xtrackers ESG MSCI World UCITS ETF
summary: Xtrackers (IE) Plc - Xtrackers ESG MSCI World UCITS ETF is an exchange-traded fund that aims to replicate the performance of the MSCI World ESG Screened Index. The ETF invests in a portfolio of companies globally that demonstrate strong environmental, social, and governance (ESG) practices while also excluding those involved in certain controversial activities. It provides investors with a diversified exposure to global equities with a focus on sustainability.

name: Direxion Shares ETF Trust - Direxion Daily FTSE China Bear 3X Shares
summary: Direxion Daily FTSE China Bear 3X Shares is an exchange-traded fund (ETF) that seeks daily investment results, before fees and expenses, of 300% of the inverse (or opposite) of the daily performance of the FTSE China 50 Index. The fund uses leverage, which increases both risk and potential returns, to achieve its investment objective, making it suitable for sophisticated investors seeking short-term exposure to the Chinese stock market. The ETF is managed by Direxion Shares ETF Trust, located in the United States.

name: Direxion Shares ETF Trust - Direxion Daily FTSE China Bull 3X Shares
summary: The Direxion Daily FTSE China Bull 3X Shares seeks daily investment results, before fees and expenses, of 300% of the daily performance of the FTSE China 50 Index, which is designed to represent the performance of the 50 largest and most liquid public companies currently trading on the Hong Kong Stock Exchange. The fund achieves its investment objective by investing at least 80% of its net assets in financial instruments, such as swap agreements, securities of the index, and ETFs that track the index, that provide leveraged exposure to the index. Direxion Shares ETF Trust is based in the United States.

name: SPDR Bloomberg Barclays 1-3 Month T-Bill UCITS ETF USD Unhedged (Acc)
summary: The investment objective of the Fund is to seek to provide investors with a total return, taking into account both capital and income returns, which generally reflects the return of the Bloomberg Barclays US Treasury Bills 1-3 Month Index.

name: SPDR Bloomberg Barclays 1-3 Month T-Bill UCITS ETF MXN Hedged (Acc)
summary: The investment objective of the Fund is to seek to provide investors with a total return, taking into account both capital and income returns, which generally reflects the return of the Bloomberg Barclays US Treasury Bills 1-3 Month Index.
